text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry for interrupting you in the middle of a
meeting. About the damage to the inferior...
choice_data_list:
Damage... to the inferior? Did you mean
interior?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah... Last night, I had a drink to kick-start
my thoughts... and drank too much coffee.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The label said something like "Feel alert and say
goodbye to drowsiness." But I never imagined it'd
be so effective as to keep me awake so long...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... You should be careful with coffee as well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just one cup had this effect... I'll... have only half
a cup today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to her guileless personality, Sakura
Bakushin O suffers from insomnia after drinking
just a single cup of coffee...
